name: Personal Portfolio
description: A responsive portfolio website showcasing my projects, technical skills, experience, and professional profile.
challenge: Balancing a polished visual presentation with a responsive layout while keeping the portfolio lightweight and fast.
futurePlans: Add motion-driven case studies, richer filters, and an easier content update flow for new projects.

name: FIFA Prediction League
description: A full-stack football prediction web application with real-time leaderboard, knockout qualification logic, role-based admin panel, and automated scoring system.
challenge: Balancing real-time scoring updates, role-based access, and knockout logic without making the interface hard to use.
futurePlans: Add richer analytics, better match insights, and expanded tournament management features.

name: Marvel Rivals Crosshair Showcase
description: Showcase of Marvel characters with crosshair effects.
challenge: Creating a playful visual showcase without sacrificing layout stability across different screen sizes.
futurePlans: Expand the showcase with more interactive controls, animation presets, and stronger accessibility states.

name: FC26 Auction
description: Real-time football player auction platform built with Next.js App Router, NextAuth, MongoDB, and Socket.IO. Features manager registration, live auctions with real-time bidding, lineup management, achievements tracking, admin controls, and tournament fixtures with full role-based access control.
challenge: Synchronizing live auction updates and role-based behaviors without making the interface feel complex.
futurePlans: Add richer analytics, tournament summaries, and more advanced admin workflows.

name: Task Tracker App
description: A full-stack task management application with JWT authentication, real-time updates, and a responsive user interface.
challenge: Designing a simple task flow that still supported live updates and authenticated access.
futurePlans: Add drag-and-drop task organization, reminders, and richer team collaboration features.

name: FPL News Portal
description: Your ultimate hub for all things Fantasy Premier League! Features real-time FPL news updates, points calculator, player performance analysis, and fixture difficulty. Built with modern technologies and mobile-first responsive design with glassmorphism UI and custom dark/light mode transitions.
challenge: Presenting fast-changing sports data in a clean interface without overwhelming the user.
futurePlans: Add personalized dashboards, stronger filtering, and more visual insights for player comparisons.

name: Bookshop Management System
description: A full-stack online bookstore with inventory management, REST APIs, Firebase authentication, and MongoDB integration.
challenge: Keeping inventory, authentication, and UI interactions consistent across both client and backend layers.
futurePlans: Add order tracking, wishlists, and a more detailed admin analytics dashboard.

name: Rainwater Convention Website
description: A 4-page event website (Home, FAQs, Registration, Admin) with participant registration form, client-side validation, and admin portal for managing registrations. Features localStorage persistence and SweetAlert2 modals.
challenge: Handling form validation and admin workflows while keeping the site lightweight and fast to navigate.
futurePlans: Add email notifications, better analytics, and a richer admin experience.

name: User List Application
description: Dynamic user information display with card view layout, integrated search functionality, and sorting capabilities. Built with modern React patterns and responsive design using Tailwind CSS and Daisy UI.
challenge: Making search and sort interactions feel responsive while keeping the interface lightweight.
futurePlans: Add server-side filtering, saved preferences, and more advanced filtering controls.
